mapper.sql: id , entrustment_id, report_code, sample_name, price, required_completion_time, task_code, state, number, report_type, verifyer_time, issuer_time, seal_type, apply_reason, issu_reason, verifyer, issuer, applicant, sealer, seal_time, report_manager, report_time, addressee, waybill, operate_time,email,report_phone,report_mailing_address, report_complete_time,seal_url,combine_time
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM test_report_record where id = #{recordId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into test_report_record (id, entrustment_id, report_code, sample_name, price, required_completion_time, task_code, state, number, report_type, verifyer_time, issuer_time, seal_type, apply_reason, issu_reason, verifyer, issuer, applicant, sealer, seal_time, report_manager, report_time, addressee, waybill, operate_time, email, report_phone, report_mailing_address, report_complete_time, task_id,type,entrust_id) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entrustmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{reportCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sampleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{price,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requiredCompletionTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{taskCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{number,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{reportType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{verifyerTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{issuerTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{sealType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{issuReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{verifyer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{issuer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applicant,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sealer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sealTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{reportManager,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reportTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{addressee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{waybill,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reportPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reportMailingAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reportCompleteTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{entrustId,jdbcType=BIGINT})

insert into test_report_record
id,
entrustment_id,
report_code,
sample_name,
price,
required_completion_time,
task_code,
state,
number,
report_type,
verifyer_time,
issuer_time,
seal_type,
apply_reason,
issu_reason,
verifyer,
issuer,
applicant,
sealer,
seal_time,
report_manager,
report_time,
addressee,
waybill,
operate_time,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{entrustmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{reportCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sampleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{price,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{requiredCompletionTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{taskCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{number,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{reportType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{verifyerTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{issuerTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{sealType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{applyReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{issuReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{verifyer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{issuer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{applicant,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sealer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sealTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{reportManager,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reportTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{addressee,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{waybill,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{operateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update test_report_record
entrustment_id = #{entrustmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
report_code = #{reportCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sample_name = #{sampleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price = #{price,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
required_completion_time = #{requiredCompletionTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
task_code = #{taskCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
state = #{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
number = #{number,jdbcType=INTEGER},
report_type = #{reportType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
verifyer_time = #{verifyerTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
issuer_time = #{issuerTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
seal_type = #{sealType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
apply_reason = #{applyReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
issu_reason = #{issuReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
verifyer = #{verifyer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
issuer = #{issuer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
applicant = #{applicant,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sealer = #{sealer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
seal_time = #{sealTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
report_manager = #{reportManager,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
report_time = #{reportTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
addressee = #{addressee,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
waybill = #{waybill,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
operate_time = #{operateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
report_phone = #{reportPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
report_mailing_address = #{reportMailingAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update test_report_record set entrustment_id = #{entrustmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, report_code = #{reportCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sample_name = #{sampleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, price = #{price,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, required_completion_time = #{requiredCompletionTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, task_code = #{taskCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, state = #{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, number = #{number,jdbcType=INTEGER}, report_type = #{reportType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, verifyer_time = #{verifyerTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, issuer_time = #{issuerTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, seal_type = #{sealType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, apply_reason = #{applyReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, issu_reason = #{issuReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, verifyer = #{verifyer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, issuer = #{issuer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, applicant = #{applicant,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sealer = #{sealer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, seal_time = #{sealTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, report_manager = #{reportManager,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, report_time = #{reportTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, addressee = #{addressee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, waybill = #{waybill,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, operate_time = #{operateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT report_type, report_time, addressee, report_phone, report_mailing_address, waybill, report_manager, operate_time, email, id, entrustment_id FROM test_report_record WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT report_code, state, report_complete_time, combine_time, verifyer_time, issuer_time, seal_time, operate_time FROM test_report_record where entrustment_id = #{entrustId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT report_code, state, report_complete_time, combine_time, verifyer_time, issuer_time, seal_time, operate_time, type FROM test_report_record WHERE entrustment_id = #{entrustId,jdbcType=BIGINT} UNION ALL SELECT report_code, state, report_complete_time, combine_time, verifyer_time, issuer_time, seal_time, operate_time, type FROM test_report_record_mid WHERE entrust_id = #{entrustId,jdbcType=BIGINT} UNION ALL SELECT report_code, state, report_complete_time, combine_time, verifyer_time, issuer_time, seal_time, operate_time, type FROM test_report_record WHERE entrust_id = #{entrustId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT report_code, state, report_complete_time, combine_time, verifyer_time, issuer_time, seal_time, operate_time FROM test_report_record where entrust_id = #{entrustId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_report_record WHERE entrust_id = #{entrustId}

SELECT * FROM test_report_record WHERE entrust_id = #{entrustId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND report_complete_time = ( SELECT MAX( report_complete_time ) FROM test_report_record WHERE entrust_id = #{entrustId,jdbcType=BIGINT} )
mapper.update:
update test_report_record
report_code = #{reportCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
state = #{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
applicant = #{applicant,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
report_complete_time = #{reportCompleteTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update test_report_record
state = #{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
applicant = #{applicant,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
report_complete_time = #{reportCompleteTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
verifyer = #{verifyer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
verifyer_id = #{verifyerId},
issuer = #{issuer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
issuer_id = #{issuerId},
template_name = #{reportUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where entrustment_id = #{entrustmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT} or entrust_id = #{entrustmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT state FROM test_report_record WHERE entrustment_id = #{id}
SELECT entrustment_id, state, report_complete_time FROM test_report_record
SELECT id, entrustment_id, state, report_complete_time FROM test_report_record where entrustment_id=#{entrustId}
SELECT MAX( SUBSTR( report_code FROM 13 )+0 ) FROM test_report_record WHERE report_code LIKE CONCAT('%-',#{year},'-%') AND report_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{code},'%')

SELECT MAX( SUBSTR( report_code FROM 13 )+0 ) FROM test_report_record WHERE report_code LIKE CONCAT('%-',#{year},'-%') AND report_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{code},'%') AND report_code LIKE CONCAT('%-',#{type},'-%')
SELECT entrust_category_type FROM `test_entrusted_info` WHERE id = #{entrustId}
SELECT MAX( SUBSTR( report_code FROM 13 )+0 ) FROM test_report_record_mid WHERE report_code LIKE CONCAT('%-',#{year},'-%') AND report_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{code},'%')

SELECT MAX( SUBSTR( report_code FROM 13 )+0 ) FROM test_report_record_mid WHERE report_code LIKE CONCAT('%-',#{year},'-%') AND report_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{code},'%') AND report_code LIKE CONCAT('%-',#{type},'-%')

SELECT DISTINCT report_file_uri code FROM test_report_record t1 LEFT JOIN test_report_record_detail t2 ON t1.id = t2.record_id LEFT JOIN test_product_item t3 ON t2.check_item_id = t3.check_item_id LEFT JOIN test_report_template t4 ON t3.report_model_id = t4.id WHERE report_file_uri IS NOT NULL AND entrustment_id = #{entrustId} -- entrustment_id = 1647480232433100

SELECT DISTINCT t4.id FROM test_report_record t1 LEFT JOIN test_report_record_detail t2 ON t1.id = t2.record_id LEFT JOIN test_product_item t3 ON t2.check_item_id = t3.check_item_id LEFT JOIN test_report_template t4 ON t3.report_model_id = t4.id WHERE report_file_uri IS NOT NULL AND entrustment_id = #{entrustId} -- entrustment_id = 1647480232433100

SELECT DISTINCT t4.id FROM test_report_record t1 LEFT JOIN test_report_record_detail t2 ON t1.id = t2.record_id LEFT JOIN test_product_item t3 ON t2.check_item_id = t3.check_item_id LEFT JOIN test_report_template t4 ON t3.report_model_id = t4.id WHERE report_file_uri IS NOT NULL AND entrust_id = #{entrustId}

SELECT t3.check_item_id value, t4.report_file_uri label FROM test_report_record t1 LEFT JOIN test_report_record_detail t2 ON t1.id = t2.record_id LEFT JOIN test_product_item t3 ON t2.check_item_id = t3.check_item_id LEFT JOIN test_report_template t4 ON t3.report_model_id = t4.id WHERE report_file_uri IS NOT NULL AND entrustment_id = #{entrustId}
select count(*) FROM test_report_record WHERE state =#{state}

SELECT t2.entrustment_no, t1.report_code, t1.category, t1.sample_name, t1.applicant, t1.report_complete_time, t1.addressee, t1.report_time, t3.task_code taskCode, t4.NAME teamName, t1.type as reportTypeStatus FROM test_report_record t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_task t3 ON t1.entrustment_id = t3.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_team t4 ON t3.dept_id = t4.id
t1.applicant is not null
and t2.entrustment_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustmentNo},'%')
and t3.task_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{taskCode},'%')
and t1.report_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{reportCode},'%')
and t1.sample_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{sampleName},'%')
and t1.applicant LIKE CONCAT('%',#{applicant},'%')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.report_complete_time, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.report_complete_time, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endingDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and t1.type = #{reportTypeStatus}
ORDER BY t2.entrustment_no

SELECT t1.id report_id, t1.entrustment_id entrustId, t2.entrustment_no, t2.entrust_company, t1.report_manager, IFNULL( CONCAT( t2.entrust_category_type, t2.entrustment_no ), t2.entrustment_no ) AS entrustmentNostr, t1.report_code, t1.category, t1.sample_name, t1.applicant, t1.report_complete_time, t1.addressee, t1.report_time, t1.waybill, t1.type as reportTypeStatus FROM test_report_record t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.id
t1.applicant is not null
and t2.entrustment_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustmentNo},'%')
and t2.entrust_company LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustCompany},'%')
and t1.report_manager LIKE CONCAT('%',#{reportManager},'%')
and t1.report_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{reportCode},'%')
and t1.sample_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{aliasName},'%')
and t1.applicant LIKE CONCAT('%',#{applicant},'%')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.report_complete_time, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.report_complete_time, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endingDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and t1.type = #{reportTypeStatus}
and t2.entrust_category_type = #{entrustCategoryType}
ORDER BY t2.entrustment_no

SELECT t1.id report_id, t1.entrust_id entrustId, t2.entrustment_no, t2.entrust_company, t1.report_manager, IFNULL( CONCAT( t2.entrust_category_type, t2.entrustment_no ), t2.entrustment_no ) AS entrustmentNostr, t1.report_code, t1.category, t1.sample_name, t1.applicant, t1.report_complete_time, t1.addressee, t1.report_time, t1.waybill, t1.type as reportTypeStatus FROM test_report_record_mid t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info t2 ON t1.entrust_id = t2.id
t1.applicant is not null
and t2.entrustment_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustmentNo},'%')
and t2.entrust_company LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustCompany},'%')
and t1.report_manager LIKE CONCAT('%',#{reportManager},'%')
and t1.report_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{reportCode},'%')
and t1.sample_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{aliasName},'%')
and t1.applicant LIKE CONCAT('%',#{applicant},'%')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.report_complete_time, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.report_complete_time, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endingDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and t1.type = #{reportTypeStatus}
and t2.entrust_category_type = #{entrustCategoryType}
ORDER BY t2.entrustment_no

SELECT t1.id report_id, t2.entrustment_no, t2.entrust_company, t1.report_manager, t1.report_code, t1.category, t1.sample_name, t1.applicant, t1.report_complete_time, t1.addressee, t1.report_time, t1.waybill, t3.task_code taskCode, t4.NAME teamName, t1.type as reportTypeStatus FROM test_report_record t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_task t3 ON t1.entrustment_id = t3.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_team t4 ON t3.dept_id = t4.id
t1.applicant is not null
and t2.entrustment_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustmentNo},'%')
and t2.entrust_company LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustCompany},'%')
and t1.report_manager LIKE CONCAT('%',#{reportManager},'%')
and t3.task_code = #{taskCode}
and t1.report_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{reportCode},'%')
and t1.sample_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{aliasName},'%')
and t1.applicant LIKE CONCAT('%',#{applicant},'%')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.report_complete_time, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.report_complete_time, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endingDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and t1.type = #{reportTypeStatus}
and t2.entrust_category_type = #{entrustCategoryType}
ORDER BY t2.entrustment_no

SELECT t1.id report_id, t2.entrustment_no, IFNULL( CONCAT( t2.entrust_category_type, t2.entrustment_no ), t2.entrustment_no ) AS entrustmentNostr, t1.report_code, t2.entrust_company, t1.report_manager, t1.category, t1.sample_name, t1.applicant, t1.report_complete_time, t1.addressee, t1.report_time, t1.waybill, t3.task_code taskCode, t4.NAME teamName, t1.type as reportTypeStatus FROM test_report_record_mid t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info t2 ON t1.entrust_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_task t3 ON t1.entrust_id = t3.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_team t4 ON t3.dept_id = t4.id
t1.applicant is not null
and t2.entrustment_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustmentNo},'%')
and t2.entrust_company LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustCompany},'%')
and t1.report_manager LIKE CONCAT('%',#{reportManager},'%')
and t3.task_code = #{taskCode}
and t1.report_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{reportCode},'%')
and t1.sample_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{aliasName},'%')
and t1.applicant LIKE CONCAT('%',#{applicant},'%')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.report_complete_time, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.report_complete_time, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endingDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and t1.type = #{reportTypeStatus}
and t2.entrust_category_type = #{entrustCategoryType}
ORDER BY t2.entrustment_no

SELECT t1.id, t1.category, t1.entrustment_id As entrustmentId, t1.report_code, t1.sample_name, t1.number, t1.report_type, t1.report_time, t1.addressee FROM test_report_record as t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.id WHERE 1=1
AND t1.state = 7
and t2.department in
#{id}
order by t1.operate_time desc
